nasb.text: Now it came about after this that there was war again with the Philistines at Gob; then Sibbecai the Hushathite struck down Saph, who was among the descendants of the giant.

esv.text: After this there was again war with the Philistines at Gob. Then Sibbecai the Hushathite struck down Saph, who was one of the descendants of the giants.

cnv.text: 後來，以色列人又在歌伯與非利士人爭戰。那時，戶沙人西比該擊殺了巨人的一個兒子撒弗。

ccb.text: 后来，以色列人和非利士人在歌伯打仗，户沙人西比该杀了另一个非利士巨人撒弗。
